clip_summary: Harry Kane prepares to take a free kick for England just outside Croatia's penalty area. Players from both teams are lined up: defenders form a wall in front of the Croatian goal while England attackers position for runs. Kane steps back and sets himself over the ball.
baseline: England have a free kick near Croatia's goal.
improved: Harry Kane stands over a free kick just outside Croatia's penalty area. Croatia's wall is set and defenders mark runners, while Kane measures his run-up — a direct shot on goal or a precise delivery into the crowded box is seconds away.
